DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ALJERIE CASTILLA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; SET ONE, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS. FROM THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY IT APPEARS THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS WERE PRODUCED AFTER THE MOTION WAS FILED, SO THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS MOOT. UNDER CRC 3.1348, THE COURT MAY APPROVE SANCTIONS WHERE THE REQUESTED DISCOVERY WAS PROVIDED AFTER THE MOTION WAS FILED. ACCORDING TO THE DECLARATIONS, COUNSEL FOR MOVANT AGREED TO ACCEPT SERVICE OF DOCUMENTS NOT SUBJECT TO CONFIDENTIALITY CONCERNS BY 12/6/2018. THE DOCUMENTS WERE NOT SERVED UNTIL 12/12/2018, WERE SERVED BY MAIL, AND WERE NOT RECEIVED BY THE TIME THE PRESENT MOTION WAS FILED. THESE FACTORS WEIGH IN FAVOR OF SANCTIONS. ON THE OTHER HAND, COUNSEL FOR MOVANT COULD HAVE CONTACTED OPPOSING COUNSEL TO CONFIRM WHETHER PRODUCTION HAD BEEN MADE BEFORE SPENDING TIME PREPARING THE MOTION. ON BALANCE, THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES IS UNWARRANTED BECAUSE OF A FAILURE TO MEET-AND-CONFER BEFORE FILING THIS MOTION. HOWEVER, IT IS APPROPRIATE TO REQUIRE REIMBURSEMENT OF THE FILING FEE. THE COURT AWARDS SANCTIONS OF $60 IN FAVOR OF MOVANT. CCP 2031.300(C), CRC 3.1348. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO SBORROWMAN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Tara J. Macomber In Support Of Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Set One, And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALJERIE CASTILLA's Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Set One, And Monetary Sanctions.

From the Opposition and Reply it appears the requested documents were produced after the motion was filed, so the motion to compel is moot. Under CRC 3.1348, the Court may approve sanctions where the requested discovery was provided after the motion was filed. According to the declarations, counsel for movant agreed to accept service of documents not subject to confidentiality concerns by 12/6/2018. The documents were not served until 12/12/2018, were served by mail, and were not received by the time the present motion was filed. These factors weigh in favor of sanctions. On the other hand, counsel for movant could have contacted opposing counsel to confirm whether production had been made before spending time preparing the motion. On balance, the award of attorney fees is unwarranted because of a failure to meet-and-confer before filing this motion. However, it is appropriate to require reimbursement of the filing fee. The Court awards sanctions of $60 in favor of movant. CCP 2031.300(c), CRC 3.1348.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
